rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"lesson","text":"Document intentional security exclusions in comments near the exclusion logic, explaining why access is denied rather than granted — this resolves ambiguity during review.","scope":"src/payload/collections/CourseInstructors.ts"},{"kind":"convention","text":"LMS access control uses a dedicated helper file (instructorAccess.ts) rather than inlining permissions, keeping collection configs clean and reusable.","scope":"src/payload/access/instructorAccess.ts"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"AdvancedContentEditor must be explicitly excluded from read access in instructor permissions; omitting this exclusion silently grants broader read access than intended.","scope":"LMS instructor permissions"}]}
